home.hero_desc: El Safwa Cargo and Export provides reliable, efficient, and innovative logistics solutions worldwide. Seamless freight forwarding ensuring your goods reach their destination safely and on time.
home.feat1_desc: Comprehensive international logistics combining the speed of air with the scale of sea transport for optimal delivery.
home.feat2_desc: Extensive reach across continents backed by deep local expertise to navigate complex international regulations.
home.feat3_desc: End-to-end management ensuring complete visibility, efficiency, and reliability for your valuable cargo.
home.cert_desc: We are proud to be a fully certified IATA Freight Forwarder, upholding the highest standards of safety and efficiency in global aviation cargo.

about.subtitle: Who We Are
about.title: Delivering the World
about.p1: At El Safwa Cargo and Export, we have built our reputation on reliability, efficiency, and an unwavering commitment to our clients' success. Based in Alexandria, Egypt, we are strategically positioned at the crossroads of global trade.
about.p2: Our expertise spans decades in the freight forwarding industry, allowing us to navigate the complexities of international logistics with ease. Whether by air, sea, or land, we ensure your cargo reaches its destination safely and on schedule.
about.p3: We are proud of our IATA certification, which underscores our adherence to the highest industry standards for safety and operational excellence.
about.mission_desc: To provide world-class logistics and freight forwarding solutions that empower businesses to thrive globally. We aim to exceed expectations through innovation, dedication, and a customer-first approach.

services.subtitle: What We Do
services.title: Our Services
services.s1_desc: Fast and reliable air cargo solutions for time-sensitive shipments. We offer global coverage and competitive rates.
services.s2_desc: Cost-effective ocean transportation for large volumes. We handle both FCL (Full Container Load) and LCL (Less than Container Load).
services.s3_desc: Navigating complex international customs regulations smoothly to prevent delays and ensure compliance.
services.s4_desc: Secure storage facilities equipped with modern technology to manage your inventory effectively.
services.s5_desc: Comprehensive support for exporting goods worldwide, including documentation and compliance.
services.s6_desc: Expert advice to optimize your supply chain, reduce costs, and improve overall operational efficiency.

industries.subtitle: Sectors We Serve
industries.title: Industries
industries.i1_desc: Temperature-controlled logistics ensuring the integrity of critical medical supplies.
industries.i2_desc: Just-in-time delivery for parts and complete vehicles worldwide.
industries.i3_desc: Secure and rapid transportation of high-value electronics and components.
industries.i4_desc: Scalable solutions to meet seasonal demands and keep supply chains flowing.
industries.i5_desc: Specialized handling for perishable goods ensuring maximum freshness.
industries.i6_desc: Heavy-lift and oversized cargo management for industrial equipment.

footer.desc: Your trusted partner in global logistics and freight forwarding.
